ip_outcome_note: Card name matches character name exactly. Art depicts a figure in a form-fitting red and white dress in a corporate interior — canonical Oleana design. PokemonTCG.io confirms card name 'Oleana', set Rebel Clash (swsh2-163). Bulbapedia confirms Oleana is Vice President of Macro Cosmos and Rose's secretary in Sword and Shield. Identity confirmed.

trivia_bullets.text: Oleana serves as Vice President of Macro Cosmos and personal secretary to Chairman Rose in Pokemon Sword and Shield, functioning as the Phase 1 gate-boss: the player must defeat her in Rose Tower before confronting Rose himself [Bulbapedia: Oleana, via WebSearch snippet].

Rebel Clash (swsh2) released as part of the Sword and Shield Series with Regulation Mark D, making the card legal in Expanded format [PokemonTCG.io swsh2-163]. Artist Yusuke Ohmura also illustrated the Sonia Supporter card in the same set (no. 167/192) [PokemonTCG.io swsh2-167].

Oleana's Supporter effect — discard 2 cards, then put a Trainer card from the opponent's hand on the bottom of their deck — reflects her narrative role as an agent of disruption and removal who buries threats before they can surface [PokemonTCG.io swsh2-163 oracle text].

Before joining Rose, Oleana was a researcher who invented the Dynamax Band; Rose discovered her talent and recruited her. Her fierce loyalty to Rose is the game's central character study in institutional devotion — she Gigantamaxes her Garbodor during the player's confrontation at Rose Tower [Bulbapedia: Oleana, via WebSearch snippet].
